name_en: Model 666218- Summer New Arrival 🌷MCM🌷 Replica. Same as Jo Xin and Wu Xuanyi's Patricia Visetos Mini Crossbody Saddle Bag. This Patricia shoulder bag is a 🌷MCM🌷 classic, based on the classic Patty style, combining Bauhaus-inspired design and craftsmanship, showcasing 🌷MCM🌷's excellent heritage in crafting luxury goods. The bag features a shiny laurel lock on the front, making it an ideal choice for a charming look. Dimensions 7 x 18 x 18
